description: Acre.fi is a Bitcoin-first platform that connects investors with institution grade yield opportunities. Led by executives and founding team members from Fold, Casa, tBTC, and Thesis, Acre is backed by Draper Dragon, Orange DAO, and executives from Ledger, Lido, and Eigenlayer.

name: Staked R2USD
description: R2 Protocol is the consumer gateway to institutional-grade RWA yields. R2 aims to democratize access to $1T+ of tokenized assets through DeFi vaults. R2 partners with leading funds (Securitize, BlackRock, Apollo etc.) to co-design customized RWA (T-Bills & Private Credit) yield products, making institutional-grade opportunities accessible to everyone. R2 is looking to bootstrap $3M worth of USDC to be provided into its sR2USD+ vault, which generates real yield from tokenized credit assets and is complemented with a token incentive program. LPs must remain deposited for at least 60 days to qualify for the full yield. Early withdrawals (<60d) will result in forfeiting all yields.

name: TermMax USDC Vault V2
description: TermMax is a fixed-rate, fixed-term DeFi borrowing and lending protocol featuring one-click looping strategies. Curators and market makers deploy customizable Uniswap V3-style AMM curves optimised for fixed-rate markets, enabling efficient pricing and improved risk management. Users can easily lend, borrow, leverage, or deposit into vaults to manage capital effectively. TermMax is bootstrapping $5mm worth of USDC, WETH, or WBTC to be provided into their V2 vaults with a guaranteed yield and token incentive program.
